items.title: Procter & Gamble Builds Health Portfolio And Community Trust With New Moves
items.description: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) is acquiring Wonderbelly, a "free from" digestive wellness brand, expanding its health and wellness portfolio. The company is also deploying its Disaster Relief Program in Mississippi after a severe winter storm, supplying essential products and support services. These moves highlight a focus on consumer health trends and community support, outside of routine earnings updates. Procter & Gamble, trading at $151.77, sits in the large cap consumer staples space with...

items.title: TD Cowen Sees a Slower Recovery Path Taking Shape at Procter & Gamble (PG)
items.description: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) is included among the 12 Best Stocks to Buy for the Long Term. On January 27, TD Cowen downgraded The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) to Hold from Buy while raising its price target to $156 from $150. The firm cautioned that the company’s turnaround is “likely to drag.” […]

items.description: We recently published Jim Cramer Discussed Trump, CEOs & These 10 Stocks. The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer discussed.
